# Rolls-Royce Dubai (rollsroycers.com)

> Rolls-Royce Dubai is a luxury Rolls-Royce rental service in Dubai, United Arab Emirates. We offer chauffeur-driven and self-drive Rolls-Royce hire with free delivery across Dubai, 24/7 WhatsApp booking, and multilingual service in English, Arabic, and Russian. Book on WhatsApp at +971 55 816 4922.

## What We Do
Rolls-Royce Dubai rents the full current Rolls-Royce range — Phantom, Ghost, Cullinan, Spectre, Wraith, and Dawn — to clients in Dubai and the wider UAE. Rentals are available with a professional chauffeur, or as self-drive for renters who meet the qualifying requirements. Free delivery and collection are offered across Dubai. Bookings are taken 24/7 by WhatsApp, phone, or email.

- **Website:** https://rollsroycers.com
- **WhatsApp / phone:** +971 55 816 4922
- **Email:** info@rollsroycers.com
- **Booking:** https://rollsroycers.com/booking
- **Languages:** English, Arabic (العربية), Russian (Русский)
- **Operating entity:** Naqra FZE (Free Zone Establishment), Sharjah Publishing City Free Zone, UAE — Trade License 4425576.01

## Fleet & Daily Prices

| Model | Body type | Daily rate (AED) |
|---|---|---|
| Rolls-Royce Ghost | Luxury saloon | 3,800 |
| Rolls-Royce Wraith | Coupé | 5,000 |
| Rolls-Royce Dawn | Convertible | 5,500 |
| Rolls-Royce Phantom | Flagship saloon | 5,800 |
| Rolls-Royce Cullinan | 7-seat SUV | 6,500 |
| Rolls-Royce Spectre | Electric coupé | 7,500 |

- **Hourly hire:** from AED 800 per hour (2-hour minimum).
- **Long term:** discounted weekly and monthly rates available — ask on WhatsApp for a quote.
- All prices are in UAE dirhams (AED). Confirm current rates at booking.

## Services
- **Weddings** — white bridal Rolls-Royce with decoration.
- **Corporate** — executive and business transport.
- **Airport transfer** — Dubai International (DXB) and Al Maktoum (DWC), with meet & greet.
- **Professional chauffeur** — multilingual drivers (English, Arabic, Russian).
- **Events & red carpet** — arrivals for galas, premieres, and VIP occasions.
- **Photoshoots & film** — Rolls-Royce vehicles for shoots and content.
- **City tours** — chauffeured Dubai sightseeing.
- **Hourly hire** — short bookings from AED 800/hour (2-hour minimum).
- **Long-term / monthly** — discounted extended rentals.

## Service Areas
Dubai coverage with free delivery: Downtown Dubai, Dubai Marina, Palm Jumeirah, JBR (Jumeirah Beach Residence), Business Bay, DIFC, Deira, and Jumeirah. Service also extends to Abu Dhabi.

## How to Book
1. Message WhatsApp **+971 55 816 4922** (24/7), or email info@rollsroycers.com.
2. Tell us the model, dates/times, and whether you want a chauffeur or self-drive.
3. We confirm availability, the rate, and a free delivery time and place in Dubai.
- Self-drive is available to renters who meet the qualifying requirements; a chauffeur option is available for all bookings.

## FAQ
- **What does Rolls-Royce Dubai do?** Luxury Rolls-Royce rental in Dubai — chauffeur-driven or self-drive — with free delivery across Dubai.
- **How much does it cost?** Daily rates range from AED 3,800 (Ghost) to AED 7,500 (Spectre). Hourly hire starts at AED 800 (2-hour minimum). Weekly and monthly rates are discounted.
- **Can I drive it myself?** Yes — self-drive is available to qualifying renters. A chauffeur option is also available.
- **Do you deliver?** Yes — free delivery and collection across Dubai.
- **How do I book?** WhatsApp +971 55 816 4922, available 24/7.
- **What languages do you speak?** English, Arabic, and Russian. The website is available in all three.
- **Do you cover the airport?** Yes — transfers to and from DXB and DWC with meet & greet.
